meaning: n.羊,绵羊,羞答答的人,胆小鬼,信徒
examples: Sheep were grazing in the fields.
They kept a small flock of sheep.
The field had been grazed by sheep.
The bus startled a herd of yaks who stampeded off the road like sheep as we approached.
Bonus: a chance to spot the elusive and endangered blue sheep, unique to this mountain range.
